name: Nexus GraphQL
description: Nexus GraphQL — CI/CD for Applications tool for developers. Specializes in GraphQL Framework.

seo.title: Nexus GraphQL Review 2026: Pricing, Alternatives & Lock-in Score
seo.meta_description: Complete Nexus GraphQL analysis: pricing, lock-in risk, migration difficulty. Compare with alternatives in CI/CD for Applications.

review.verdict: Nexus GraphQL is a Developer Portals / API Management tool.
pros: Centralizes API governance, docs, and rate limiting
cons: Adds an extra network hop and operational layer
review.best_for: Enterprises exposing APIs to partners or public
